metadata.description: The Log Analytics workspace name to deploy this solution into.
Region of the Log Analytics workspace. Must match the workspace location.

properties.descriptionHtml: HoneyForge is a hardware-based honeypot SaaS platform that deploys deception sensors across your network to detect malicious activity in real time. This solution ingests HoneyForge sensor events into Microsoft Sentinel via CEF syslog and provides an analytic rule, hunting queries, an ASIM parser, and an operational workbook.

properties.description:
Detects an interaction with a HoneyForge deception sensor. Any activity involving a HoneyForge sensor must be treated as potentially unauthorised until validated by the security operations team.

HoneyForge sensors are passive decoy devices — legitimate systems and users should never communicate with them. Any detected interaction may indicate network scanning, lateral movement, or an actively compromised device.
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    SrcIpAddr = tostring(SourceIP),
    DstIpAddr = tostring(DestinationIP),
    SensorID = tostring(DeviceCustomString1),
    CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
    SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3)),
    EventType = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceEventClassID)), "unknown", tostring(DeviceEventClassID)),
    EventActivity = tostring(Activity),
    EventProtocol = tostring(Protocol)
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| where isnotempty(DstIpAddr)
| summarize
    TimeGenerated = max(TimeGenerated),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    EventCount = count(),
    SourcePorts = make_set(tostring(SourcePort), 20),
    DestinationPorts = make_set(tostring(DestinationPort), 20),
    Protocols = make_set(EventProtocol, 10),
    Activities = make_set(EventActivity, 20),
    CEFSeverities = make_set(tostring(LogSeverity), 10),
    DeviceVersions = make_set(tostring(DeviceVersion), 10),
    Collectors = make_set(tostring(CollectorHostName), 10)
    by SrcIpAddr, DstIpAddr, SensorID, CustomerID, SensorName, EventType
| extend
    SourcePortList = strcat_array(SourcePorts, ", "),
    DestinationPortList = strcat_array(DestinationPorts, ", "),
    ProtocolList = strcat_array(Protocols, ", "),
    ActivityList = strcat_array(Activities, ", "),
    CEFSeverityList = strcat_array(CEFSeverities, ", "),
    DeviceVersionList = strcat_array(DeviceVersions, ", "),
    CollectorList = strcat_array(Collectors, ", ")
| project
    TimeGenerated, FirstSeen, LastSeen, EventCount,
    SrcIpAddr, DstIpAddr, SourcePortList, DestinationPortList, ProtocolList,
    SensorID, SensorName, CustomerID, EventType, ActivityList,
    CEFSeverityList, DeviceVersionList, CollectorList

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: HoneyForge detected {{EventCount}} event(s) targeting {{DstIpAddr}} using {{ProtocolList}}. Treat this activity as unauthorised until validated.

properties.query:
let HoneyForgeEvent = (
    starttime: datetime = datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime = datetime(null),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    dstipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    dstportnumber: int = int(null),
    hostname_has_any: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    dvcaction: dynamic = dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string = '*',
    disabled: bool = false
) {
    CommonSecurityLog
    | where not(disabled)
    | where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
    | where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
    | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
    | where (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
    | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(SourceIP, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
    | where (array_length(dstipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(DestinationIP, dstipaddr_has_any_prefix))
    | where (array_length(ipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(SourceIP, ipaddr_has_any_prefix) or has_any_ipv4_prefix(DestinationIP, ipaddr_has_any_prefix))
    | where (isnull(dstportnumber) or toint(DestinationPort) == dstportnumber)
    | extend _SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3))
    | where (array_length(hostname_has_any) == 0 or _SensorName has_any (hostname_has_any))
    | extend
        EventVendor = "BUI", EventProduct = "HoneyForge",
        EventProductVersion = tostring(DeviceVersion),
        EventSchema = "NetworkSession", EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.6",
        EventType = "NetworkSession", EventResult = "NA",
        EventStartTime = TimeGenerated, EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
        EventCount = toint(1),
        EventOriginalUid = tostring(ExtID),
        EventOriginalType = tostring(DeviceEventClassID),
        EventSeverity = case(toint(LogSeverity) >= 9, "Critical", toint(LogSeverity) >= 7, "High", toint(LogSeverity) >= 4, "Medium", "Low"),
        EventOriginalSeverity = tostring(LogSeverity),
        EventMessage = tostring(Activity),
        SrcIpAddr = tostring(SourceIP), SrcPortNumber = toint(SourcePort),
        DstIpAddr = tostring(DestinationIP), DstPortNumber = toint(DestinationPort),
        DstHostname = _SensorName,
        NetworkProtocol = tostring(Protocol), NetworkDirection = "Inbound",
        DvcHostname = tostring(Computer), DvcId = tostring(DeviceCustomString1), DvcIdType = "Other",
        HoneyForgeSensorID = tostring(DeviceCustomString1),
        HoneyForgeCustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2),
        HoneyForgeSensorName = _SensorName
    | project-away _SensorName
    | where (array_length(dvcaction) == 0)
    | where (eventresult == '*' or EventResult =~ eventresult)
    | project TimeGenerated, EventVendor, EventProduct, EventProductVersion, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventType, EventResult, EventSeverity, EventOriginalSeverity, EventOriginalUid, EventOriginalType, EventMessage, EventStartTime, EventEndTime, EventCount, SrcIpAddr, SrcPortNumber, DstIpAddr, DstPortNumber, DstHostname, NetworkProtocol, NetworkDirection, DvcHostname, DvcId, DvcIdType, HoneyForgeSensorID, HoneyForgeCustomerID, HoneyForgeSensorName
};
HoneyForgeEvent(starttime=starttime, endtime=endtime, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix, dstipaddr_has_any_prefix=dstipaddr_has_any_prefix, ipaddr_has_any_prefix=ipaddr_has_any_prefix, dstportnumber=dstportnumber, hostname_has_any=hostname_has_any, dvcaction=dvcaction, eventresult=eventresult, disabled=disabled)
properties.functionParameters: starttime:datetime=datetime(null), endtime:datetime=datetime(null), srcipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]), dstipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]), ipaddr_has_any_prefix:dynamic=dynamic([]), dstportnumber:int=int(null), hostname_has_any:dynamic=dynamic([]), dvcaction:dynamic=dynamic([]), eventresult:string='*', disabled:bool=False

tags.name: description
tags.value: ASIM NetworkSession parser for HoneyForge Threat Detection Platform events.

properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d)
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend
    SrcIpAddr   = tostring(SourceIP),
    SensorName  = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3)),
    CustomerID  = tostring(DeviceCustomString2)
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    SensorsHit = dcount(SensorName),
    CustomersAffected = dcount(CustomerID),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
    SensorList = make_set(SensorName, 20),
    Protocols = make_set(tostring(Protocol), 10),
    DestPorts = make_set(tostring(DestinationPort), 20)
    by SrcIpAddr
| sort by TotalEvents desc
| extend
    SensorListStr = strcat_array(SensorList, ", "),
    ProtocolStr   = strcat_array(Protocols, ", "),
    DestPortStr   = strcat_array(DestPorts, ", ")
| project SrcIpAddr, TotalEvents, SensorsHit, CustomersAffected, FirstSeen, LastSeen, SensorListStr, ProtocolStr, DestPortStr

properties.displayName: HoneyForge - Repeated Probes from Same Source
HoneyForge - Repeated Probes from Same Source
properties.query:
let lookback = 14d;
let minSessionGap = 1h;
let minReturnVisits = 2;
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend SrcIpAddr = tostring(SourceIP), SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3))
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| sort by SrcIpAddr asc, TimeGenerated asc
| serialize
| extend PrevTime = prev(TimeGenerated, 1), PrevSrc = prev(SrcIpAddr, 1)
| extend IsNewSession = iff(SrcIpAddr == PrevSrc and (TimeGenerated - PrevTime) < minSessionGap, 0, 1)
| summarize TotalEvents = count(), SessionCount = sumif(IsNewSession, IsNewSession == 1), SensorsHit = dcount(SensorName), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), SensorList = make_set(SensorName, 20) by SrcIpAddr
| where SessionCount >= minReturnVisits
| extend DaySpan = datetime_diff('day', LastSeen, FirstSeen), SensorListStr = strcat_array(SensorList, ", ")
| sort by SessionCount desc, TotalEvents desc
| project SrcIpAddr, SessionCount, TotalEvents, SensorsHit, DaySpan, FirstSeen, LastSeen, SensorListStr

tags.value: HoneyForge - Repeated Probes from Same Source

properties.displayName: HoneyForge - Repeated Probes from Same Source
HoneyForge - Sensor Fleet Coverage and Health
HoneyForge - Sensor Fleet Coverage and Health
properties.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend SensorID = tostring(DeviceCustomString1), CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2), SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3))
| summarize TotalEvents = count(), UniqueSources = dcount(SourceIP), FirstEvent = min(TimeGenerated), LastEvent = max(TimeGenerated), Protocols = make_set(tostring(Protocol), 10) by SensorID, SensorName, CustomerID
| extend MinutesSinceLast = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastEvent), SensorStatus = iff(datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastEvent) <= 10, "Online", "Offline / No Recent Events"), ProtocolStr = strcat_array(Protocols, ", ")
| sort by SensorStatus asc, LastEvent desc
| project SensorName, SensorID, CustomerID, SensorStatus, MinutesSinceLast, TotalEvents, UniqueSources, FirstEvent, LastEvent, ProtocolStr

tags.value: HoneyForge - Sensor Fleet Coverage and Health

properties.displayName: HoneyForge - Sensor Fleet Coverage and Health

properties.query:
let lookback = 24h;
let burstWindow = 10m;
let burstThreshold = 50;
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend SrcIpAddr = tostring(SourceIP), SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2)
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| summarize BurstCount = count(), SensorsHit = dcount(SensorName), SensorList = make_set(SensorName, 10), Protocols = make_set(tostring(Protocol), 5), DestPorts = make_set(tostring(DestinationPort), 10), WindowStart = min(TimeGenerated), WindowEnd = max(TimeGenerated) by SrcIpAddr, CustomerID, bin(TimeGenerated, burstWindow)
| where BurstCount >= burstThreshold
| extend SensorListStr = strcat_array(SensorList, ", "), ProtocolStr = strcat_array(Protocols, ", "), DestPortStr = strcat_array(DestPorts, ", ")
| sort by BurstCount desc
| project SrcIpAddr, CustomerID, BurstCount, SensorsHit, WindowStart, WindowEnd, SensorListStr, ProtocolStr, DestPortStr

let lookback = 7d;
let businessStart = 7;
let businessEnd = 19;
CommonSecurityLog
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(lookback)
| where DeviceVendor =~ "BUI"
| where DeviceProduct =~ "HoneyForge"
| extend SrcIpAddr = tostring(SourceIP), SensorName = iff(isempty(tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), tostring(Computer), tostring(DeviceCustomString3)), CustomerID = tostring(DeviceCustomString2), HourUTC = hourofday(TimeGenerated), DayOfWeek = dayofweek(TimeGenerated)
| extend IsOffHours = case(DayOfWeek == 0d or DayOfWeek == 6d, true, HourUTC < businessStart or HourUTC >= businessEnd, true, false)
| where IsOffHours == true
| where isnotempty(SrcIpAddr)
| summarize TotalEvents = count(), SensorsHit = dcount(SensorName), SensorList = make_set(SensorName, 20), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), HoursActive = make_set(HourUTC, 24), Protocols = make_set(tostring(Protocol), 10) by SrcIpAddr, CustomerID
| sort by TotalEvents desc
| extend SensorListStr = strcat_array(SensorList, ", "), ProtocolStr = strcat_array(Protocols, ", ")
| project SrcIpAddr, CustomerID, TotalEvents, SensorsHit, FirstSeen, LastSeen, SensorListStr, ProtocolStr
